chapter_context.summary: An exhortation to obey God's laws and a warning against idolatry.

outline.explanation: This section focuses on Call to Obedience (4:1-14), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Deuteronomy.
This section focuses on Warning Against Idolatry (4:15-31), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Deuteronomy.
This section focuses on The Uniqueness of God (4:32-40), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Deuteronomy.
This section focuses on Cities of Refuge (4:41-43), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Deuteronomy.

key_themes.title: Covenant Loyalty
key_themes.description: The requirement to love and obey God from the heart.

key_themes.title: Remembrance
key_themes.description: The importance of recalling God's acts to maintain faith.

devotional.question: How can we 'circumcise our hearts' today as Moses commanded the Israelites?
What blessings have you seen in your life as a result of choosing obedience?

cultural_historical.title: The Second Law
cultural_historical.text: Deuteronomy is not a new law but a 're-iteration' (deutero-nomos) for the generation about to enter the land.
